'''Humming peepers''' were hummingbird-like creatures that lived on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]]. The [[peeper]]s had white feathers and pink bellies.<ref name="RotP" /> The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]] also had humming peepers.<ref name="Fight">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]''
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{Hologram}}
